title: Cyclothymia - NHS
text:
ere's probably a genetic link because cyclothymia, depression and bipolar disorder all tend to run in families.
In some people, traumatic events or experiences may act as a trigger for the condition, such as severe illness or long periods of stress .
Page last reviewed: 9 October 2023
Next review due: 9 October 2026
